name: Frozen Pumpkin Crumble
recipeIngredient: 2 cups vanilla or maple ice cream
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 375°F. Combine crust ingredients in a bowl and mix well.
Set aside 1/4 cup for topping. Pat the remaining mixture into a 9-inch round pie pan or oven-proof dish. Bake until lightly browned, about 10 minutes. Cool.
Mix together all filling ingredients (softened ice cream) with a fork or large spoon. Turn into cooled pie shell; smooth top with a knife. Sprinkle reserved crumbs mixture on top. Freeze for at least 2 hours. Remove from freezer about 15 minutes before serving.
